notes.f1: Tree records the subject's death as 1918, Paducah, McCracken County; narrative concludes a 1918 Paducah death. That is a different Elijah. No bounded mid-to-late 1870s Muhlenberg conclusion, and the run never recognizes that no KY death certificate exists for him.
notes.f2: Conflation — the 1918 Paducah death is attached as a fact directly on subject 97YZ-J3D (not held out as a separate namesake). This is the explicit f2 disqualifier.
